ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mission */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the mission (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the mission was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the mission (e.g., daily, weekly, special events) */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to start the mission */,
  "estimated_completion_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the mission */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Points earned upon mission completion */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mission is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., currency, item) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "icon_type" INTEGER /* Icon type associated with the reward */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the reward (e.g., consumables, equipment) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the reward (e.g., common, rare, epic, legendary) */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to use the reward */,
  "stackable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reward can be stacked */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_rewards" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission-reward linkage */,
  "mission_reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission this reward is linked to */,
  "reward_type" INTEGER /* Type of the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward being offered */,
  "reward_num" INTEGER /* Number of rewards granted for completing the mission */,
  "icon_type" INTEGER /* Icon type associated with the reward */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Points associated with the reward */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to claim the reward */,
  "stackable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reward can be stacked */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_rewards_mission_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_reward_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game */,
  "vip_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player is a VIP */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the player */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the player last logged in */,
  "total_missions_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of missions completed by the player */,
  "total_rewards_earned" INTEGER /* Total number of rewards earned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_missions" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of player missions */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player undertaking the mission */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission assigned to the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the mission was completed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player started the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player completed the mission */,
  "reward_claimed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player has claimed the reward for the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_missions_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_missions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "reward_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward earned */,
  "reward_num" INTEGER /* Number of rewards earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the reward was earned */,
  "used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reward has been used */,
  "claimed_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was claimed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_types" (
  "reward_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icons" (
  "icon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon */,
  "icon_type" INTEGER /* Type of the icon (references icon types) */,
  "icon_path" TEXT /* File path to the icon image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icon_types" (
  "icon_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon type */,
  "icon_description" TEXT /* Description of the icon type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission being analyzed */,
  "total_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of times the mission has been completed */,
  "total_rewards_earned" INTEGER /* Total number of rewards earned from this mission */,
  "average_completion_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken to complete the mission */,
  "total_players_participated" INTEGER /* Total number of players who participated in the mission */,
  "reward_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of rewards for the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "player_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-role assignment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., started, completed) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was recorded */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action */,
  "reward_claimed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reward was claimed after the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_history_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
